rationale: Runs 12-15 all landed within 2% of run 11 on the Pi 5 Pareto frontier; further group_size reduction appears to have hit diminishing returns at group_size=32. Shifting focus to vision_token_budget: trying budgets [64, 96, 128] at INT4 g64 on Pi 5. The SmolVLM ablation in their ICLR 2025 paper suggests 96 tokens is a reliable floor for photo captioning before quality drops noticeably — I'm treating that as a soft lower bound but flagging the applicability since their setup used a different encoder.
